purpose: Normalize a Slack maker request into a deterministic deck intake before spec composition or private runtime execution.

source_boundary.slack_role: Collect user intent, attachments, and clarification state.
source_boundary.ppt_test_role: Normalize, validate, and write request-linked intake artifacts.
source_boundary.asset_boundary: Reference approved asset manifests or brand/style IDs only; do not scan raw external asset folders.

clarification_boundaries.missing_title: derive from first sentence when possible; otherwise mark needs_clarification
clarification_boundaries.missing_primary_goal: derive from message text when possible; otherwise mark needs_clarification
clarification_boundaries.missing_audience: default to leadership and record defaulted_field
clarification_boundaries.raw_asset_path_request: record as blocked_asset_boundary_issue and request approved manifest or materialized package
